title: scandix pecten-veneris f. involucrata
intro: Scandix pecten-veneris f. involucrata is a variant of the plant Scandix pecten-veneris, also known as Shepherd's Needle or Wild Parsnip. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Scandix pecten-veneris f. involucrata include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
